pr.author: dependabot[bot]
pr.title: Update pyright requirement from <=1.1.410 to <=1.1.411 in /src/bindings/python

root_cause: The 'Pack openvino_node_npm_package' step (step 28) completed with success exit code but appears to not have created the openvino_node_npm_package.zip file. The subsequent upload step (step 37) using actions/upload-artifact@v7.0.1 with if-no-files-found: error failed immediately because the zip was not present. This is likely due to the PowerShell Compress-Archive command silently failing without propagating a non-zero exit code.
pr_changes: Only modified src/bindings/python/requirements_test.txt (pyright version update) - unrelated to JS API
investigation_notes: Despite the PR only changing a Python requirements file, JS_API component was in affected_components, causing JS-related steps to run. Step 28 (Pack npm package) shows success but file not found at upload. Steps 26 (CMake JS), 27 (Pack JS), 36 (Upload JS package) all succeeded.
